title: Skip image-only markdown headings during paper title ingestion
problem: Several real AG95 markdown files begin with image-only heading lines, so ingestion can set the paper title to a local image path. That weakens package search queries and reduces existing-node reuse in accumulated runs.
proposed_change: When deriving a paper title, ignore empty headings and markdown image-only lines, then use the first substantive heading or text line.
acceptance_criteria: A regression with '# ![](images/cover.jpg)' followed by a real heading ingests the real heading as the paper title; affected AG95 papers such as mr4701883, mr4712863, and mr4777095 no longer use image paths as titles.

observations.context: Pre-run check for ag95-diverse-003-16p found three new papers with image-path titles; after the fix ingest returns real titles.

history.note: Implemented in ingest title extraction and covered by pytest.
